body_language.description: Physical presence, posture, eye contact, and non-verbal signals during an interview

voice_modulation.description: Tone, pace, clarity, and confidence in verbal delivery

answering_structure.description: Organising answers with clear beginning, middle, and end (e.g. STAR method)

handling_nervousness.description: Techniques to manage anxiety and channel it into positive energy during interviews

preparation.description: Research, practice, and readiness strategies before the interview

grammar.description: Correct sentence structure, tense usage, and grammatical accuracy

vocabulary.description: Range and appropriateness of words used in spoken English

pronunciation.description: Clarity and accuracy of spoken sounds and word stress

fluency.description: Smoothness and naturalness of speech without excessive pausing or hesitation

listening_comprehension.description: Understanding spoken English in real conversations and contexts

customer_acquisition.description: Strategies to find and attract new customers to a business

pricing.description: How to price products or services for profitability and market fit

financial_management.description: Tracking income, expenses, and making sound financial decisions

marketing.description: Promoting a business or product to reach and engage the right audience

device_usage.description: Basic smartphone and computer usage skills

internet_safety.description: Staying safe online, avoiding scams, and protecting personal data

app_navigation.description: Using mobile apps effectively for common tasks

digital_payments.description: Using UPI, mobile wallets, and online banking safely
